title: Getting Started with Hello World
description: Write your first program in the test department

steps.instruction: Read the Hello World concept definition
steps.expectedOutcome: You understand that Hello World outputs a greeting
steps.hint: Look at the description field first

steps.instruction: Compare the Python and C++ panel expressions
steps.expectedOutcome: You can identify what Python simplifies vs C++

steps.instruction: Follow the analogy cross-reference to math-variables
steps.expectedOutcome: You see how programming variables relate to mathematical variables
